headline: A Look At Waters (WAT) Valuation As Earnings Optimism And Positive Earnings ESP Build
summary: Recent attention on Waters (WAT) centers on its history of earnings surprises and a positive Earnings ESP, with investors watching the May 5, 2026 report as expectations build around upcoming results. See our latest analysis for Waters. Despite optimism around earnings, Waters' recent share price performance has been weak, with a 90 day share price return of a 19.03% decline and a 1 year total shareholder return of a 12.36% decline, suggesting momentum has been fading even as valuation...
